en: Thank you. This smells delicious. Can you pass me the pepper, please?
ko: 고마워. 맛있는 냄새야. 후추 좀 건네줄래? 응 여기

en: Yeah, here you go. Thank you. I don't seem to have any cutlery. Oops. There you go. Thank you.
Do you want a top-up? Yeah, just a drop, please.
ko: 고마워. 한 잔 더 줄까? 응 조금만

en: Cheers. Do you have any napkins? I've made a mess. Oh, yeah. There you go. Thank you.
ko: 건배. 냅킨 있어? 지저분하게 됐어. 응. 여기. 고마워

en: There's plenty more. Do you want seconds? Oh, thanks. That was delicious,.
ko: 더 많아. 한 그릇 더 줄까? 고마워. 맛있었는데 한 입도 더 못 먹겠어

en: But I couldn't eat another bite. Room for dessert? I made some cake. Oh, go on, then.
ko: 디저트 먹을 배는 있어? 케이크 만들었는데. 그럼 먹을게
